name: Chapter 1 Core Encounter Cards
description: FFG has kindly made the Chapter 1 core encounter sets available for PnP so anyone can still play older campaigns even if you don’t own Chapter 1 core... or if you do but you need a set of encounters for every campaign you own! Print a full set or select a chapter 1 campaign you own and print just the cards needed for that campaign.

options.name: The Night of the Zealot (complete set)
